source: Cammelot simulation parameters derived from IZA 2023-2026 + NZa 2025

scenarios.name: IST (Current State)
scenarios.description: 30% admin burden. GPs lose 7.2 hrs/week to paperwork.

scenarios.name: IZA Target (2026)
scenarios.description: IZA target: reduce admin to 25% by 2026. +15 consults/week.

scenarios.name: SOLL (AI-Native)
scenarios.description: Ambient AI scribes + auto-FHIR. Admin < 10%. E_ai = 1.34x.
